title: adenophora palustris
intro: Adenophora palustris, also known as swamp bugbane or sweet bugbane, is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adenophora palustris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and improve respiratory function. Adenophora palustris is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including coughs and colds.
